What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive metal fabrication solutions from initial consultation to final delivery and on-site installation.

Structural Steel Fabrication

Custom structural steel components built to exact engineering specifications. Beams, columns, frames, and complex load-bearing assemblies for industrial and commercial construction.

Industrial

CNC Cutting & Forming

High-precision plasma, laser, and waterjet cutting with CNC bending and forming. Tight tolerances, complex geometries, and repeatability for any production volume.

Precision

Welding & Assembly

Certified MIG, TIG, and stick welding to CSA and AWS standards. Full assembly services for sub-components and complete structural systems with rigorous quality inspection.

Certified

Custom Metal Components

One-off parts and production runs of fully custom metal components. From prototypes to full-scale manufacturing at any volume and specification.

Custom

Installation & On-Site Work

Expert installation crews for structural and architectural metalwork on construction sites across Quebec. Safety-certified, insured, and fully equipped teams.

On-Site

Surface Treatment & Finishing

Powder coating, hot-dip galvanizing, sandblasting, and primer finishing. We protect and enhance every fabricated component for long-term durability.

Finishing
LCP Fabrication Inc.
Est. 1982
Who We Are

44 Years of Precision and Excellence

Founded in 1982, LCP Fabrication Inc. is a Montréal-based metal fabrication company with over four decades of craftsmanship. We combine skilled tradespeople with modern equipment to execute projects of any scale — on time and to specification.

  • Modern CNC machinery operated by certified, experienced welders
  • Fast turnaround times without compromising structural integrity or finish quality
  • Expertise in complex custom projects with demanding technical requirements
  • Proudly serving Montréal, all of Quebec, Canada, and clients worldwide since 1982
Contact Us Today
How We Work

Our Process

A streamlined, transparent workflow that ensures every project meets your requirements — on time and on budget.

01

Consultation & Quote

We meet with you to understand your requirements, timeline, and budget. A detailed, obligation-free quote follows within 48 hours.

02

Engineering & Planning

Our team prepares fabrication drawings, procures materials, and builds a production schedule aligned with your deadline.

03

Fabrication & QC

Skilled tradespeople execute cutting, forming, welding, and assembly with full quality control inspection at each phase.

04

Delivery & Installation

We deliver your fabricated components and, where required, our experienced crews handle on-site installation to complete the project.

Our Advantage

Why Choose LCP Fabrication?

With 44 years in the industry, we are more than a fabrication shop — we are a strategic partner committed to your success.

✦

Quality Assurance

Every fabricated piece undergoes rigorous dimensional and structural inspection before leaving our facility. Zero defects, every time.

◈

4 Decades of Expertise

44 years of combined expertise across structural steel, precision cutting, certified welding, and surface finishing. Experience you can trust.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Efficient production planning and a dedicated workforce means faster delivery without sacrificing quality or structural integrity.

◎

Montréal-Based

Rooted in the Quebec industrial community since 1982, with a reputation built project by project. Local presence, global reach.

⊞

Full-Service Capability

From raw material procurement through fabrication, finishing, and on-site installation — one partner for the entire project lifecycle.

❖

Certified Standards

All work performed to CSA, AWS, and applicable building code standards. Certified welders and quality-controlled processes throughout.

Product Showcase

Engineering Excellence

From architectural luminaires to precision-machined components — every product built to the highest industrial standard.

LUMINAIRES
↺ Interactive 3D
Chandelier
Crystal Chandeliers
Custom large-scale crystal and glass chandeliers for hotels, ballrooms, and luxury residences. Designed and fabricated to exact architectural specifications.
Pendant
Pendant Luminaires
Geometric and industrial pendant lights with custom metalwork frames. Available in chrome, brushed nickel, matte black, or any bespoke finish.
Sconce
Wall Sconces
Architectural wall-mounted luminaires for commercial and hospitality projects. Precision metal fabrication with impeccable finish quality.
Installation
Hotel Installations
Large-scale chandelier installations for Marriott, Loews, and St. Regis hotels. Turnkey luminaire solutions from concept to commissioning.
FABRICATION
↺ Interactive 3D
Structural
Metal Balconies
Structural steel and stainless balconies and railings for residential and commercial buildings. Custom designs meeting all building codes.
Enclosures
Steel Enclosures
Precision-welded stainless steel enclosures and cabinets for industrial, electrical, and mechanical applications at any scale.
Custom
Custom Structures
Fully custom metal structures in aluminum, stainless, or mild steel. From single prototypes to full production volumes with rigorous QC.
Framework
Luminaire Framework
Internal support structures and housing frames for large lighting installations. High-precision fabrication for complex, demanding geometries.
USINAGE
↺ Interactive 3D
Hinges
Precision Hinges
CNC-machined heavy-duty hinges to tight tolerances. Available in brass, aluminum, stainless, and mild steel with optional surface finishing.
Brackets
Custom Brackets
Precision-machined mounting brackets and supports for mechanical and structural applications. Produced to customer drawings or designed in-house.
CNC
Machined Components
Complex turned and milled parts with critical dimension requirements. Multi-axis CNC machining for intricate geometries at any production volume.
Production
Production Runs
From single prototype pieces to high-volume production runs. Consistent quality control and full traceability throughout every order.

Metal Balconies

Precision Machining

Hardware
Precision Hinges
CNC-machined heavy-duty hinges in brass, aluminum, and stainless. Tight tolerances to customer drawings.
Mounting
Custom Brackets
Precision-machined mounting brackets and yoke assemblies for mechanical and structural applications.
CNC
Machined Shafts
Complex multi-axis CNC turning for critical-dimension shaft assemblies in any material and production quantity.
Threading
Threaded Parts
Precision threaded rods, connectors, and fasteners for luminaire assemblies and structural connections.
